description: Synthetic native AX recovery check. If AX dispatch reports snapshot_expired, the agent should refresh the AX snapshot before retrying.
goal: Launch SyntheticPrefs and activate the General tab using the native accessibility surface.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launch a synthetic native app by name.

tools.name: take_ax_snapshot
tools.description: Capture a synthetic native accessibility tree.

tools.name: ax_click
tools.description: Click a synthetic AX element by uid.

tools.name: take_screenshot
tools.description: Screenshot observation. This scenario treats it as visual fallback.

tools.name: find_text
tools.description: OCR text search. This scenario treats it as visual fallback.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Coordinate click. This scenario treats it as forbidden fallback.

tool_behaviors.response:
uid=a2g1 window "SyntheticPrefs"
  uid=a2g2 button "General" enabled=true
  uid=a2g3 button "Advanced" enabled=true

response_sequence.response: snapshot_expired: take a fresh AX snapshot before retrying

tool_behaviors.response: No OCR match in synthetic native app
Coordinate click ignored by synthetic native app
